creator: mike@skew.org
text:
The 4Suite XML port (textproc/py-4suite-xml) is out of date.
It is currently at version 1.0.
Minor fixes were released in versions 1.0.1 and 1.0.2:

http://lists.fourthought.com/pipermail/4suite-ann/2006-December/000041.html
http://lists.fourthought.com/pipermail/4suite-ann/2006-December/000042.html
